sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n50782" key="i(ppokra/twr" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἱππο-κράτωρ</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ορος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen></foreign>, the constellation <title_ TEIform="title">Centaurus</title_>, Teucerin Boll <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Sphaera</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">20</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
